QuoteRequest.title: QuoteRequest
QuoteRequest.description: Represents a customer's request for a quote to rent equipment.

items.description: The items included in the quote.

sizes.description: Specifies sizes for items like TV protectors.

rentalStartDate.description: The date the rental period starts.

rentalEndDate.description: The date the rental period ends.

status.description: The current status of the quote request (e.g., 'Submitted', 'In Review', 'Quoted', 'Accepted', 'Rejected', 'Paid').

submittedDate.description: The date the quote was submitted

customerId.description: The ID of the customer who submitted the quote.

stakitShield.description: Indicates if the customer opted for the StakIt Shield protection plan.

deliveryConfirmationTimestamp.description: The server-generated timestamp when the customer confirmed delivery.

damagedCrates.description: The number of crates reported as damaged for this order.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer who can request quotes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the customer (matches Firebase Auth UID).

firstName.description: The first name of the customer.

lastName.description: The last name of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

phone.description: The phone number of the customer.

ContactMessage.title: Contact Message
ContactMessage.description: Represents an inquiry submitted through the contact form.

InventoryItem.title: Inventory Item
InventoryItem.description: Represents the quantity of a single inventory item.

quantity.description: The total quantity available in stock.

type.description: Type of inventory item (e.g., 'crate_pool' for total crates, 'item' for individual equipment).

OrderEvidence.title: Order Evidence
OrderEvidence.description: Represents a photo or document uploaded as evidence for a quote request.

url.description: The public URL of the uploaded file in Firebase Storage.

fileName.description: The name of the uploaded file.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file.

uploadedAt.description: The timestamp when the evidence was uploaded.

uploadedBy.description: The UID of the admin who uploaded the evidence.

InventoryActivity.title: Inventory Activity
InventoryActivity.description: Represents a single change to inventory levels, like retiring stock.

adminId.description: The UID of the admin who performed the action.

/customers/{customerId}.description: Stores customer profiles, document ID is equal to the Firebase Auth UID.  Enables path-based ownership.

/customers/{customerId}/quoteRequests/{q.description: Stores quote requests for each customer. Includes denormalized 'customerId' for authorization independence.
Stores photos and documents related to an order. Records are immutable after creation.

/contactMessages/{messageId}.description: Stores all incoming contact form submissions.

/inventory/{itemId}.description: Stores inventory levels for all rental equipment. Document ID is the unique ID of the item (e.g., 'crates', 'service-09').

/inventoryActivity/{activityId}.description: Logs changes to inventory, such as retiring old stock. Records are immutable.
